title: Oil crashes to 3-month low: Brent below $86.5, WTI $84.88 — 3rd consecutive day of declines
snippet: Brent crude oil fell more than 4% on Friday to below $86.5/bbl, the lowest since early March. WTI at $84.88, down 3.23%. This marks the 3rd consecutive day of oil price declines as deal optimism is priced into energy markets. Markets closed Saturday June 14. Previous closes: $90.38 (6/12), $88 (6/13), $86.5 (6/14 Friday). Total 3-day decline approximately 10% from $93.
tag_reason: 유가 3일 연속 하락 확인 — Brent $93→$90.38→$88→$86.5; 3월 초 이후 최저; 딜 반영 본격화
